artifacts.summary: Priority-sequenced 8-phase plan: (1) fix nandi/hamsa CPU-vendor factual bug in root README; (2) de-stale docs/configuration.md + docs/unstable-packages.md; (3) repoint docs/how-to-add-package.md + docs/how-to-add-service.md to the module layout; (4) correct packages/README.md + docs/packages.md (marker-pdf removal, opencode/kooha/slidev additions, python312->python3); (5) emoji sweep of eligible docs; (6) conservative comment-only cleanups in modules/system/{packages,desktop}.nix + home.nix verified by nix flake check; (7) create overlays/README.md; (8) DEFERRED user-confirmation items (Ryzen doc consolidation, niri testing-phase framing, niri.md emoji strip) not executed autonomously.
